heading: Pausing and Resuming Through the API
body:
To pause an active online archive or resume a paused online
archive through the API (Application Programming Interface), send a `PATCH` request to the
[onlineArchives](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/group/endpoint-online-archive) endpoint with the
unique ID of the online archive to pause or resume. To learn more about
the syntax and options, see [API](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-updategroupclusteronlinearchive).
